    Summary: Nathan,

I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 1 lb ground beef, ½ cup onion, 1  green bell pepper, 4  medium carrots, 1 cups potato, 4 cloves garlic, 8 ounces tomato sauce, 1 ½ cup beef broth, 1 teaspoon salt, ¼ teaspoon ground black pepper, 1 teaspoon ground cumin, 1 teaspoon ground coriander, 1  bay leaf
    Tags: savory, beef
